title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SHELTERCARE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers specialized, wraparound behavioral health services. Services are customized for each individual and often include counseling, skills training, case management, peer support, and support with community navigation. 499 W 4th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Adults with OHP or Medicaid coverage, a diagnosis of a serious mental illness, and difficulty managing activities of daily living Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 505-5188 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 505-5188 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and Medicare. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of 4th and Washington LTD bus line 51 Services: Case/Care Management * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Individual Counseling * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHELTERCARE
